Threat Description: Threat actor deploys ransomware via phishing email encrypting critical files and demanding payment
Vulnerability: Lack of EDR; incomplete email filtering; no network segmentation
Current Controls: Antivirus; email spam filter; offline backups
Recommended Treatment: Deploy EDR solution; implement email sandboxing; test backups quarterly; conduct phishing simulation training

Threat Description: Attacker impersonates executive or vendor to trick employee into transferring funds or sharing credentials
Vulnerability: No MFA enforced; low security awareness; no email authentication (DMARC/DKIM)
Recommended Treatment: Enforce MFA org-wide; implement DMARC/DKIM/SPF; increase phishing simulation frequency

Threat Description: Malicious or careless employee exfiltrates sensitive data to personal storage or external party
Vulnerability: No DLP solution; excessive access permissions; no user activity monitoring
Current Controls: Role-based access control; HR onboarding/offboarding process
Recommended Treatment: Implement DLP; conduct access reviews quarterly; enable user activity logging

Threat Description: Vendor suffers breach exposing organizational data processed or stored on their systems
Vulnerability: No formal vendor risk assessment program; limited contractual security requirements
Current Controls: Vendor contracts with basic security clauses
Recommended Treatment: Implement vendor risk assessment questionnaire; require SOC 2 reports; add security requirements to contracts

Threat Description: Attacker exploits known unpatched vulnerability in operating system or application to gain unauthorized access
Vulnerability: No formal patch management process; patching is ad hoc
Recommended Treatment: Implement formal patch management policy with SLAs (critical: 24h; high: 7 days); use vulnerability scanner

Threat Description: Unauthorized individual gains physical access to systems or confidential materials
Vulnerability: Tailgating risk; visitor log not consistently maintained; server room access not badge-controlled
Current Controls: Locked office doors; reception desk sign-in
Recommended Treatment: Install badge access on server room; implement visitor escort policy; install security cameras at entry points

Threat Description: Misconfigured cloud storage exposes sensitive data publicly due to overly permissive access settings
Vulnerability: No cloud security posture management (CSPM); developers have direct production access
Recommended Treatment: Deploy CSPM tool (e.g. AWS Config; Defender for Cloud); enforce IaC with security checks; restrict prod access

Threat Description: Attacker floods organization's public-facing services with traffic causing downtime and customer impact
Vulnerability: No DDoS protection service; single-region hosting
Recommended Treatment: Evaluate DDoS mitigation service (e.g. Cloudflare); develop availability runbook

Risk Title: Loss of Critical Data - No Backup
Threat Description: Critical business data lost due to hardware failure or accidental deletion with no recoverable backup
Vulnerability: Backups not tested; no documented RTO/RPO; single-site backup storage
Recommended Treatment: Test backups monthly; implement offsite/cloud backup; define and document RTO and RPO targets

Threat Description: Organization fails to meet HIPAA Security Rule requirements resulting in regulatory fines and reputational harm
Vulnerability: No formal HIPAA compliance program; incomplete risk analysis as required by HIPAA
Current Controls: Basic data access controls; BAAs with vendors
Recommended Treatment: Conduct formal HIPAA risk analysis; develop HIPAA policies; train workforce; document all BAAs
